Package index

All functions

initialize(<FLiem>) iter(<FLiem>)
S4 class FLiem
FLmse() om() `om<-`() tracking() `tracking<-`() control(<FLmse>) oem() `oem<-`() args(<FLmse>) `args<-`(<FLmse>,<list>)
S4 class FLmse
FLoem() observations() `observations<-`() deviances(<FLoem>) `deviances<-`(<FLoem>,<list>) show(<FLoem>) iter(<FLoem>) combine(<FLoem>,<FLoem>)
Specification for the observation error model (OEM).
FLom() stock(<FLom>) `stock<-`(<FLom>,<FLStock>) sr(<FLom>) `sr<-`(<FLom>,<FLSR>) combine(<FLom>,<FLom>) `om<-`(<FLmse>,<FLo>) `tracking<-`(<FLmse>,<data.table>) `control<-`(<FLmse>,<mpCtrl>) `oem<-`(<FLmse>,<FLoem>)
A class for an operating model (OM)
cpue.ind()
Computes CPUE-based Indicators of changes in Stock Abundance
debug() undebug(<mseCtrl>,<missing>) undebug(<mpCtrl>,<character>) undebug(<mpCtrl>,<missing>) undebug(<FLo>,<ANY>)
Debugging mse modules
fixedC.hcr()
A fixed target C
fixedF.hcr()
A fixed target F
fwd.om()
A method to project the operating model (OM)
hockeystick.hcr()
Hockey-stick Harvest Control Rule
hr(<FLombf>)
hr method for FLombf
index.hat(<FLIndexBiomass>,<FLStock>)
Predicted index of abundance from abundance estimates
indicator.is()
indicator implementation function
initiate()
Initializes a population for a given virgin biomass.
mp()
mp executes a single run of a Management Procedure
initialize(<mpCtrl>) est(<mpCtrl>) `est<-`() phcr(<mpCtrl>) `phcr<-`() hcr(<mpCtrl>) `hcr<-`() isys(<mpCtrl>) `isys<-`() tm(<mpCtrl>) `tm<-`() show(<mpCtrl>) iters(<mpCtrl>) iter(<mpCtrl>) method(<mpCtrl>) args(<mpCtrl>) `method<-`(<mpCtrl>,<function>) `args<-`(<mpCtrl>,<function>) debug(<mpCtrl>,<character>)
S4 class mpCtrl
mpDispatch()
Title
initialize(<mseCtrl>) method() `method<-`() args() `args<-`() show(<mseCtrl>) exists()
S4 class mseCtrl
p4om
FLom object for North sea plaice
partialHR()
hr
perfect.oem()
A perfect observation of catch and abundances-at-age.
perfect.sa()
A perfect 'estimate' of abundances, catches and harvest.
performance(<FLQuants>) performance(<FLStock>) performance(<FLStocks>) performance(<FLom>) performance(<list>)
Compute performance statistics
sampling.oem()
sampling.oem
selectMetric()
Select and/or Compute a Metric from the stk and ind inputs
setcontrol()
setcontrol Modify on the fly the arguments on any mpCtrl module
split.is()
Split a biol target across fleets by setting relative 'quant' proportions
statistics
A complete set of performance statistics
tac.is()
TAC implementation system module
tunebisect()
Tune Management Procedures Using Bisection Method
